title: ceanothus prostratus var. pinetorum
intro: Ceanothus prostratus var. pinetorum, also known as Pinemat manzanita, is a low-growing, spreading evergreen shrub native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be utilized to treat various health issues such as wounds, burns, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Ceanothus prostratus var. pinetorum include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and providing relief from pain and fever. In herbal preparations, the leaves and branches can be used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
